headline: Why Pentair Stock Is Plummeting This Week
summary: The company reported strong earnings, but investors don't seem to care.

headline: Why Pentair (PNR) Is Down 10.8% After Raising 2026 EPS Guidance And Shuffling Leadership
summary: Pentair plc recently reported first-quarter 2026 results, with sales rising to US$1,036.7 million and net income increasing to US$172.4 million, while also updating guidance for higher full-year GAAP EPS and announcing leadership changes including the planned departure of Pool CEO Jerome Pedretti and expanded responsibilities for De’Mon Wiggins. The company coupled its record of 16 consecutive quarters of margin expansion and upgraded earnings outlook with continued share repurchases and an...
